name: Sphinx Resources Ltd.
description: Sphinx Resources Ltd. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the generation, acquisition, and development of high-quality exploration projects. The company primarily operates within the province of Québec, a jurisdiction recognized globally for its mining potential. Sphinx targets deposits of precious metals, including gold, silver, palladium, and platinum, as well as base metals such as copper and zinc. The company is committed to responsible exploration practices, emphasizing environmental restoration of disturbed areas and maintaining active, constructive partnerships with local communities to ensure sustainable development throughout its project lifecycle.
